title: justicia ovata var. angusta
intro: Justicia ovata var. angusta, also known as dwarf snakeweed, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Justicia ovata var. angusta include treating fever, headaches, and skin conditions, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, although its effectiveness and safety may vary and require further research.
